added.title: The Chosen
added.description: When a teenage orphan girl, Iyanu, unknowingly triggers her Divine Powers, she escapes Elu, the last standing city in the known world, and embarks on a remarkable journey to discover the truth about the evil lurking in the realm of Yorubaland.

added.title: The Betrayal
added.description: Elu descends into civil war as Biyi, Oba Adeyinka and Kanfo tell personal stories of past heartbreak. Iyanu, Toye, Ekun and Biyi struggle to reach The Source, while Olori continues her search for Iyanu.

added.title: Haulin' n' Ballin'
added.description: The fate of Priya and Caleb's relationship hangs in the balance as Zee struggles to keep a secret. And it all plays out during a brutal game of human pinball.

added.title: Breaking Up Is Hard To Do
added.description: Caleb is desperate to put his relationship with Priya back together while the campers tear apart the largest objects they can find.

added.title: Circling The Drain
added.description: Julia gets between Caleb and Priya during the most painful memory game of all time.

added.title: Working K9 to 5
added.description: Release the hounds! Campers are hunted by a pack of fearsome attack dogs. And one pug.

added.title: Off The Hook
added.description: Things get scary when campers are pulled into a fishhook challenge that pits them against each other AND their worst fears.

added.title: Soar Losers
added.description: Only 3 campers remain and if any of them live through the final challenge they might win the 1 million dollars Chris promised them. But on Total Drama Island promises are a lot like bones; they're often broken.

added.title: Meet the Victims
added.description: Chris welcomes 16 new campers back to the original island and divides them into two teams who face-off in a blindfolded challenge that's sure to cause pain.

added.title: Pirates of the Cabbagean
added.description: Our two teams go to war, firing cabbages from cannons at each other from their respective pirate ships. The first team to sink the other will be the winner, but someone takes a very personal interest in one specific target.

added.title: Drown Town Abbey
added.description: Each team has a member placed into a clear glass tank that is locked and slowly filling with water. In order to free them, they must retrieve the codes at the far end of a very dangerous obstacle course.

added.title: Numbskull Island
added.description: It's just a normal game of capture the flag… except the flag is a skull, and your opponents are armed with fire hoses, toilet plunger harpoons and giant rolling boulders… which is nothing like capture the flag.

added.title: Subway
added.description: The Bears are stranded on a subway platform after missing their train. But while waiting, the Bears are challenged with recovering some lost items.

added.title: Panda's Friend
added.description: Panda uses an app to find a friend with whom he has more common with. Soon things take a turn for the worse when the new friend gets too possessive.
The Baby Bears' dreams come true when they find a 100 dollar bill. But when they can't bear to spend it, they realize it's difficult to let go.

added.title: Neighbors
added.description: Some new neighbors set up camp next to the Bears' cave. Panda and Ice love it, but Grizz thinks they're up to no good.

added.title: Professor Lampwick
added.description: Chloe's professor is too mean to give her any face time to talk over her poor grade. The Bears take things into their own hands to help, causing big trouble for Chloe.

added.title: Creature Mysteries
added.description: Ranger Tabes tells the Bears she's been investigating a mysterious creature. But when the Bears realize she's actually investigating their friend Charlie, they split up to ensure Charlie's safety.

added.title: The Library
added.description: The Bears find Chloe in the library exhausted from studying for an exam all day. The Bears stay to help Chloe study but make things worse in the process.

added.title: Grizz Helps
added.description: When his brothers don't need his help for the day, Grizz leaves the cave to assist anyone he can throughout the city.

added.title: Christmas Parties
added.description: The Bears have been invited to all their friends' Christmas parties. In an effort to have time to crash Nom Nom's huge star-studded bash, the Bears first try to make quick stops at all their friends' parties throughout the night.

added.title: Grizzly the Movie
added.description: Grizz gets cast in a movie about a Grizzly Bear! But Grizz soon realizes the movie's depiction of grizzly bears is not what he had in mind.

added.title: Chapter 1: The Legs
added.description: Susie must rely on Oscar and Hedgehog in unimaginable ways after a magic trick gone wrong.

added.title: Chapter 2: If I Only Had a Wand
added.description: Hedgehog reckons with her mother's disapproval of magic.

added.title: Chapter 3: See Bees? Gee! Bees!
added.description: Oscar heads to the Sasquatch Monastery in search of enlightenment.

added.title: Chapter 4: Pepper's Funeral
added.description: With help from Pepper, Susie is able to lay a special dream of hers to rest.

added.title: Chapter 5: The Hits
added.description: Barb and the Alien King take an eventful walk around the island.
